summary: Comprehensive email system testing completed. Brevo integration working perfectly - all 5 email types sending successfully, booking/password reset flows triggering emails correctly, templates rendering with proper Bitsy branding.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 500 status for invalid email format instead of 400
minor_issues.impact: Invalid emails cause server error response, but functionality still works

passed_tests: Email service configuration (Brevo API key, sender email verified)
All 5 email types sending (booking_confirmation, new_booking_alert, password_reset, grace_period, account_blocked)
Booking email integration (emails triggered during booking creation)
Password reset email flow with OTP verification
Email HTML template rendering with Bitsy branding
